mapper.select:
SELECT J."JOB_NUM", J."MEMBER_NUM", J."JOB_TITLE", J."JOB_CONTENTS", J."JOB_CATEGORY", J."JOB_TYPE", J."JOB_LOCATION", J."JOB_PAY", J."JOB_WORK_DAY", J."JOB_WORK_TIME", J."CREATE_DATE", M."MEMBER_NAME", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME" FROM "TB_JOB" J LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON J."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM" LEFT JOIN "TB_JOB_FILE" F ON J."JOB_NUM" = F."JOB_NUM"
ORDER BY J."JOB_NUM" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}

SELECT J."JOB_NUM", J."MEMBER_NUM", J."JOB_TITLE", J."JOB_CONTENTS", J."JOB_CATEGORY", J."JOB_TYPE", J."JOB_LOCATION", J."JOB_PAY", J."JOB_WORK_DAY", J."JOB_WORK_TIME", J."CREATE_DATE", M."MEMBER_NAME", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME" FROM "TB_JOB" J LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON J."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM" LEFT JOIN "TB_JOB_FILE" F ON J."JOB_NUM" = F."JOB_NUM" WHERE J."JOB_NUM" = #{jobNum}
